TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kyu‚Äôang, title = Kyu‚Äôang, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kyu‚Äôang} }

S.FORM: Kyu'ang Itiniay i Wufeng Cen no Hsinchu ko Kyu'ang a niyaro', 20 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 40 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 90% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 36 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 10% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 4 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Saysiyat 75%, Tayal 15%.
S.PHON: kjo~u~u °aŇč itiniaj i wo~u~uf…ôŇč ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u kjo~u~u °aŇč a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u sajsijat **%, taja…ĺ **%.
S.FORM: Kyu'ang Itiniay i Wufeng Cen no Hsinchu ko Kyu'ang a niyaro', 20 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 40 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 90% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 36 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 10% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 4 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Saysiyat 75%, Tayal 15%.
